title: Vince Camuto Fretzia Perforated Suede Ankle Booties Taupe Stacked Heel Size 12M
listperfectly_description:
Western-inspired suede booties with perforated panels for breathability — the perfect spring transition boot to pair with cropped denim or a midi dress on cool evenings.

Crafted from soft nubuck leather, the Fretzia bootie blends western influence with modern edge. Perforated panels along the shaft add breathability and visual texture, while hand-laced whip-stitch detailing traces the back seam for a rugged yet refined finish. A chunky stacked wood-look heel grounds the silhouette, and a branded Vince Camuto rear zip makes for easy on-and-off. The V-notch topline and almond toe complete a versatile profile that transitions from day to evening.

You will receive the following item(s):
- Women's Ankle Booties (pair)

Measurements:
- Size / Fit: US W 12 / UK ~10 / EU ~43 / AU ~12 / D Reg Width
- Outsole length (heel-to-toe): 12 in (30.5 cm)
- Outsole width (widest): 3.75 in (9.5 cm)
- Insole length (heel to toe): 10.50 in (26.7 cm)
- Insole width (ball area): 3 in (7.6 cm)
- Heel height: 3.75 in (9.5 cm)
- Platform height (forefoot): 0.25 in (0.6 cm)
- Shaft height (from outsole): 4.50 in (11.4 cm)
- Shaft opening (circumference): 12 in (30.5 cm)
- Weight (pair): 1 lb 12 oz (0.79 kg)

Photos show exact condition from every angle; grab these before they're gone or ask any questions you need answered first.
